claim: Cellular clocks are associated with mitosis timing in NIH 3T3 cells.
evidence_sentences: The analysis of thousands of circadian cycles in dividing cells clearly indicated that both oscillators tick in a 1:1 mode-locked state, with cell divisions occurring tightly 5 h before the peak in circadian Rev-Erbα-YFP reporter expression.

conditions: cell divisions 5 h before peak in circadian reporter expression
